chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-274 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on urgent application 06.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Sachal R. Awan, Advocate for Petitioner ----- Urgency granted. Learned Counsel under instructions does not press instant Petition, which is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
